name: fleet-candidate-validation-and-priority
title: Harden pre-release fleet compatibility and canary rollout
description: Validate release candidates against disposable consumer checkouts before tagging, order rollouts by explicit fast-canary priority, and codify ownership and severity thresholds that prevent avoidable patch-release churn.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Implementation complete and validated by a real six-consumer disposable-clone sweep plus make check. Keep the task in progress until the release PR is merged and the task can be archived.
